prompt: Use the provided reference image. Preserve Main Ingrid's exact facial identity, warm Filipina features, long wavy black hair, natural smile, and medium natural body proportions. She is wearing an oversized black T-shirt, beige cargo pants, and white sneakers, standing beside her beloved giant fluffy orange tabby cat Oyen with one arm resting affectionately around his neck. Oyen has luxurious orange striped fur, expressive amber eyes, a playful tongue-out smile, oversized fluffy paws, a thick curled tail, and a leather collar with a large golden bell. A small adorable light-brown bunny sits calmly beside Oyen's front paws, looking curiously at the camera, completing the cozy family portrait. Clean beige seamless studio background, soft diffused studio lighting, photorealistic skin, ultra-detailed fur, shallow depth of field, luxury pet photography, cinematic composition, warm wholesome atmosphere, 8K, highly detailed, heartwarming friendship portrait.

promptZh: 使用提供的参考图像。保留 Main Ingrid 的精确面部特征、温暖的菲律宾女性面容、长波浪黑发、自然的微笑以及匀称的身材。她身穿超大号黑色 T 恤、米色工装裤和白色运动鞋，站在她心爱的 巨型毛茸茸橘色虎斑猫 Oyen 身边，一只手臂亲昵地搭在它的脖子上。Oyen 拥有华丽的橘色条纹皮毛、富有表现力的琥珀色眼睛、俏皮的吐舌微笑、超大号的毛茸茸爪子、粗壮的卷曲尾巴，以及戴着一个大金铃铛的皮革项圈。一只可爱的小浅棕色兔子安静地坐在 Oyen 的前爪旁，好奇地看着镜头，完成了这张温馨的家庭肖像。干净的米色无缝摄影棚背景，柔和的漫射摄影棚灯光，照片级真实皮肤质感，超精细皮毛，浅景深，奢华宠物摄影，电影级构图，温暖治愈的氛围，8K 分辨率，高度细节，暖心的友谊肖像。
